comparison_base_assumption: Used commit 70ddd886a047b110690656c52f3a3a00cc9eb2e1, the immediate parent of implementation commit 5c332730b252a1a07fb0309f691b1935ec1b2c8d, because the task explicitly asked for the remediation delta against that parent.
documentation_decision: Updated the existing tactical docs instead of creating new ones. `doc/UsersGuide.md` now states that the lower panel shrinks back after constrained-width pressure is removed, and `doc/DesignNotes.md` now captures the current-geometry height recomputation plus the live/test proof that the shrink-back behavior is deterministic. No tactical rules document or repository-wide guidance update was needed because the remediation stayed localized to tactical layout behavior.
